description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoon panda bear, featuring a large, rounded white head with brown ears and expressive, wide brown eyes. The face has a small, triangular nose and a subtle, gentle smile, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its body is predominantly brown with a white belly patch, and the arms are short and slightly outstretched to the sides. The legs are short and rounded, matching the overall soft and cuddly aesthetic. The surface appears to be made of a soft, matte fabric, likely polyester or similar plush material, with a lightweight, squeezable stuffing inside. The toy is free of any visible clothing, accessories, or branding, emphasizing its simple and classic design.
description: A soft, plush cartoon panda bear stuffed toy with a large white head, brown ears, and a friendly facial expression. Its body is brown with a white belly, short arms, and rounded legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the panda's large white face, brown ears, expressive eyes, and a white belly patch on its brown body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roundness of the head, the protruding ear, and the profile of the short arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, both brown, with no facial features or belly patch visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the round head, ear, and the side profile of the limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, subtle smile. The features convey a sense of calm and approachability.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched to the sides and legs close together, head facing forward.
